title: Why did gendo and seele part ways
display_title: Why did gendo and seele part ways
wikitext:
[]: Why did gendo and seele part ways? Post by chrisv25 » Wed Mar 26, 2008 6:41 pm I am going to watch the series again but, from what I remember, gendo tried to bring Yui back and Seele was trying to implement instrumentality, is that why they parted ways? Thanks!

[]: Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Wed Mar 26, 2008 7:06 pm They were never after the same thing. Gendo was playing the old men to get what he wanted till he got caught.

[]: Post by Sachi » Wed Mar 26, 2008 7:13 pm Seele was going to stay instrumentelized , while Gendo was gonne pull a Shinji and reject it, making it a world with him and Yui alone. (Kinda like a Shinji and Asuka did.) Gendo was pretty much using Seele as a means of getting what he wanted. Some speculation of other members think that he married Yui just to get closer to Seele. So yeah, they were never on the same page.

[]: Post by V » Wed Mar 26, 2008 7:36 pm I think maybe Gendo initially agreed with Seele's plan but after Yui's contact experiment he changed his mind. but it's not just about "Gendo wants to be with Yui"; quite ironically, I think Gendo ultimately cared more about "human life" (though only in an abstract sense) than Seele did. It's really only hinted at in the brief conversation at the beginning of EoE, but basically not only does Gendo want Yui back, but he thinks Seele's version of Third Impact is philosophically unsound. "life can't come from death".

[]: Post by Ornette » Wed Mar 26, 2008 7:52 pm V wrote: I think maybe Gendo initially agreed with Seele's plan but after Yui's contact experiment he changed his mind. but it's not just about "Gendo wants to be with Yui"; quite ironically, I think Gendo ultimately cared more about "human life" (though only in an abstract sense) than Seele did. It's really only hinted at in the brief conversation at the beginning of EoE, but basically not only does Gendo want Yui back, but he thinks Seele's version of Third Impact is philosophically unsound. "life can't come from death".

[]: Post by RandomStuff » Wed Mar 26, 2008 8:22 pm I always thought that no matter how much of an evil bastard Gendo was, his devotion to bring back Yui was kind of sweet.

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Mar 26, 2008 8:36 pm Too true....Though the fact he fucked over everybody else including Shinji....

[]: Post by RandomStuff » Wed Mar 26, 2008 8:41 pm That's why he's an evil bastard.

[]: Post by BobBQ » Wed Mar 26, 2008 9:12 pm RandomStuff wrote: That's why he's an evil bastard.

[]: Post by chrisv25 » Wed Mar 26, 2008 9:27 pm Thank everyone, I appreciate the replies. Lots of food for thought for when I rewatch the DVDs.

[]: Post by AuraTwilight » Thu Mar 27, 2008 11:44 am Seele was going to stay instrumentelized, while Gendo was gonne pull a Shinji and reject it, making it a world with him and Yui alone. (Kinda like a Shinji and Asuka did.)

[]: Post by honsou » Thu Mar 27, 2008 12:17 pm AuraTwilight wrote: Seele was going to stay instrumentelized, while Gendo was gonne pull a Shinji and reject it, making it a world with him and Yui alone. (Kinda like a Shinji and Asuka did.)

[]: Post by Xard » Thu Mar 27, 2008 12:19 pm As far as I know you can't create your own, totally new lalaland through HIP. I take Gendo's plan was to stop instrumentality in the middle BUT he would board EVA-01 Ark's alone and chill out with Yui for all eternity

[]: Post by Hunter21 » Thu Mar 27, 2008 4:03 pm Basically what Xard is saying is what I believe. Gendo didn't want instrumentality so he could have every one disappear and come back with just Yui and himself in the real world. He wanted to start instrumentality so he could join up with Yui and then Kick everyone back out (into the real world). That way it would just be those two joined together for enternity and everyone else would go on living their pathetic lives.

[]: Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Thu Mar 27, 2008 5:30 pm isn't there a thread on this already?

[]: Post by Ornette » Thu Mar 27, 2008 6:06 pm Probably not a thread dedicated to answering this specific question, but plenty of threads discussing the differences between Gendo's plans and Seele's plans: http://www.evageeks.org/forum/viewtopic.php?t=2556 http://evageeks.org/forum/viewtopic.php?t=3218 http://www.evageeks.org/forum/viewtopic.php?t=4448 http://www.evageeks.org/forum/viewtopic.php?t=4115 http://www.evageeks.org/forum/viewtopic.php?t=4108 A somewhat relevant one from the archive: http://www.evageeks.org/forum/viewtopic.php?t=3859 I suppose any further discussion about instrumentality should go in one of those threads, since the question has been essentially answered, I'm locking this thread
